ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-17-2024 Continued To Mar-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kathryn Murphy appeared via zoom for Karen Gregory (petitioner).

Ms. Murphy stated that the estate is ready to close, that there is cash in the estate account, that they have real property to split between the estate and trust, that they are keeping the house, and that a first amended petition shall be filed and the possibility waiving the accounting. The matter is continued to March 13, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Petition to be filed by February 28, 2024.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Chui: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Dec-20-2023 Continued To Jan-17-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-08-2023 Continued To Dec-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kathryn M. Murphy appeared via zoom for Karen Laura Gregory (petitioner).

Ms. Murphy requests a continuance to file her petition. First and final account and report of executor etc., is continued to December 20, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Judge Moody authorizes petition hearing date for December 20, 2023. Papers to be filed by December 06, 2023.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Cabrera: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Nov-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Katheryn Murphy appeared via zoom for Karen Gregory (petitioner).

Ms. Murphy stated that she will transfer 50% half interest into descendants trust account, that decedent's daughter has been repairing the home from water intrusion, that she will not be asking for l statutory fees for the additional assets. The Court suggested either file an amended petition or a new petition. First and final account and report of executor etc., is continued to November 08, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Set petition to be given a hearing date of November 08, 2023.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-02-2023 Continued To Sep-13-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance: Kathryn M. Murphy appearing via zoom for Karen Gregory (executor).

Mrs. Murphy stated that she will file the supplemental inventory and appraisal within a week and finish the amended accounting. First and final account and report of executor Karen Laura Gregory is continued to September 13, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-07-2023 Continued To Aug-02-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-12-2023 Continued To Jun-07-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy appeared by zoom for Karen Gregory (executor).

Mrs. Murphy stated that the estate is just about to be closed, and that they've had a petition for final distribution on file since the end of August with no opposition to date, but that there is a separate trust in which this case transfers over to that trust. Mrs. Murphy also spoke of issues in which the transfer deed of the property was executed, stated that there was a limitation put on the deed only as to a one-half interest, and that the wife is the trustee of the property which is to be held for the daughter for more years. The court instructed Mrs. Murphy to amend her petition to a two-year accounting. Mrs. Murphy is to inform the executor that she needs to provide an informal accounting of the $17,199.32 reserve. Mrs. Murphy noted that it states in the petition that the reserve is to pay for fees and costs. The First and Final Account and Report of Executor, etc. is continued to June 7, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-08-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy, via Zoom, for Karen L. Gregory, Personal Representative.

Ms. Murphy reports that a petition for Final Distribution which will include an accounting should be filed by today. The court and Ms. Murphy discuss the discrepancy of the most recent Inventory and Appraisal and advises that she intends to submit a new courtesy copy to the court.

The Status of Closing the Estate is continued to Aug-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Jun-08-2022 Continued To Aug-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy, via Zoom, for Karen Gregory, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that the Inventory and Appraisal ("I&A") is with the probate referee and expects to have it back, perhaps as soon as next week, and that the petition for final distribution cannot be finalized until she has the I&A.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Aug-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar May-11-2022 Continued To Jun-08-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy, via Zoom, for Karen Gregory, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports that an accounting is largely finished but still needs to forward an Inventory and Appraisal to the probate referee, which she intends to do today.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Jun-08-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Closing The Estate
Off Calendar Mar-16-2022 Continued To May-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kathryn Murphy, via ZOOM, for Karen Gregory, Personal Representative.

Counsel acknowledges the delay with preparing and filing a petition and offers oral testimony regarding the delay and confirms that she plans to file a Petition for Final Distribution and requests a continuance of thirty days.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to May-11-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: G. Bastain. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-22-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: No appearance required. Pro forma hearing only for purposes of admitting will.

This matter is on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will, the Court noting that notice of the proceedings appears to be complete and that no objection has been made to the Petition. The Court grants the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The Will dated August 25, 2010 is admitted to probate. Karen Laura Gregory is appointed the Executor of the estate with full authority under the Independent Administration of Estates Act. Bond is waived. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for hearing on March 16, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Ruiz; Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
